how.title: How Powerbook.ai works
how.subtitle: A modern AI shopping engine that understands natural language — not just keywords — and finds the best listings for you across marketplaces.
how.what_body: Powerbook is a semantic shopping search platform. You describe what you want in everyday language (or upload a photo), and our AI turns that into structured intent, searches relevant marketplaces, and ranks results by how well they match your request. No account, no forms — just describe and discover.
how.serve_intro: Powerbook is built for buyers who want clarity before they click through to a listing:

serve_items.intent: Clear AI interpretation of what you asked for
serve_items.marketplaces: Aggregated results from multiple marketplace sources
serve_items.ranking: Ranked matches with reasons why each item fits
serve_items.links: Direct paths to view listings where products are sold
serve_items.locale: English and Albanian — tuned to your region when possible

how.features_title: Built for how people actually shop
how.categories_body: Cars, books, art, electronics, furniture, fashion, luxury, real estate, gifts, and more — one engine, many categories.
how.cta_text: Ready to try it? Describe your next purchase in your own words.

describe.title: You describe (or show) what you want
describe.body: Type a natural-language request — e.g. “Audi A6 2020 white under 180k km” — or upload a product photo. Choose search scope: your city, country, region, or worldwide.

parse.title: AI understands intent
parse.body: Our parser extracts category, brand, price limits, features, colors, and more into structured JSON. With photos, vision AI identifies the product type and visual attributes.

search.title: Marketplaces are queried
search.body: Powerbook searches mock (and future live) marketplace providers in parallel, filtered by your location scope and parsed criteria.

rank.title: Results are ranked for you
rank.body: Each listing gets a relevance score. You see why AI picked it, apply smart filters, and open the best matches — ranked, not just listed.

semantic.title: Semantic, not keyword-only
semantic.body: Meaning and context matter. Similar ideas match even when wording differs from listing titles.

vision.title: Photo search
vision.body: Snap or upload an image; AI describes the product and feeds that into the same search pipeline.

geo.title: Location-aware
geo.body: Detects your region via IP and prioritizes nearby listings when you want local results.

instant.title: Instant, no account
instant.body: Real-time AI search with no registration, passwords, or saved profiles.

searching: AI is analyzing and searching the web…
placeholder: Describe what you want to buy…
no_results: No matches found. Try broadening your description.
affiliate_note: Buy links may include affiliate partnerships (coming soon).
footer: Powerbook.ai — Semantic shopping engine. No accounts. Real-time AI search.
